'''wasudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyattie|cyattie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-s-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyattie|cyattie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wasudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæsidhith|wæsidhith]] || [[word:wæsidhij|wæsidhij]] || [[word:wæsidhish|wæsidhish]] || [[word:wæsidhi|wæsidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wasusudhuth|wasusudhuth]] || [[word:wasusudhuj|wasusudhuj]] || [[word:wasusudhush|wasusudhush]] || [[word:wasusudhu|wasusudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wasudhuth|wasudhuth]] || [[word:wasudhuj|wasudhuj]] || [[word:wasudhush|wasudhush]] || [[word:wasudhu|wasudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wasufdhuth|wasufdhuth]] || [[word:wasufdhuj|wasufdhuj]] || [[word:wasufdhush|wasufdhush]] || [[word:wasufdhuf|wasufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wasudhuthu|wasudhuthu]] || [[word:wasudhuju|wasudhuju]] || [[word:wasudhushu|wasudhushu]] || [[word:wasudhuku|wasudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wasudhuth|wasudhuth]] || [[word:wasudhuj|wasudhuj]] || [[word:wasudhush|wasudhush]] || [[word:wasudhu|wasudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wasudhuthul|wasudhuthul]] || [[word:wasudhujul|wasudhujul]] || [[word:wasudhushul|wasudhushul]] || [[word:wasudhukul|wasudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wasudhuthuthu|wasudhuthuthu]] || [[word:wasudhujuju|wasudhujuju]] || [[word:wasudhushushu|wasudhushushu]] || [[word:wasudhuku|wasudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wasudhuthun|wasudhuthun]] || [[word:wasudhujun|wasudhujun]] || [[word:wasudhushun|wasudhushun]] || [[word:wasudhukun|wasudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wasudhuthuoro|wasudhuthuoro]] || [[word:wasudhujuoro|wasudhujuoro]] || [[word:wasudhushuoro|wasudhushuoro]] || [[word:wasudhukuoro|wasudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
